Lots of blackberries grow along the fence barrier to Little Mulberry Park. There is a gate here with a small turn off, and you can access the berries very easily. There are also many more inside the park, along the trails Falling Fruit season: July-September.
3 pecan trees near entrance to subdivision. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Several pawpaw along the ravine trail at the park. Mostly small, observed only one with fruit. At the bottom of the trail along creek there is a stand of approx 12' tall trees - no fruit observed on these. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-Novemb

you will need to walk the trails inside the park, but I saw 3 trees LOADED with fruit last night, one on each of the meadow trails and the other near the playground. They won't be fully ripe until it gets cooler outside. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: S
